title: High stakes battle in Garkha as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Garkha. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Garkha
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Garkha assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
